summary.key_theme: 公司憑藉核能發電優勢與 Walmart 簽署長期購電協議，且獲分析師看好其作為 AI 能源需求增長的長期投資標的。

bullish.title: Walmart (WMT) Secures Long Term Nuclear Power Deal With Constellation Energy
bullish.reason: 與 Walmart 簽署長期核能購電協議，顯示公司在無碳能源市場的強大競爭力與穩定營收前景。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy: Even The Short-Term Looks Fine Now
bullish.reason: 分析師指出在經歷年初 25% 的回調後，核能執照續期與未來 5 年的成長潛力使該股具備吸引力。

bullish.title: Here is Why Constellation Energy (CEG) is Among the Best Utility Stocks to Buy Now According to Hedge Funds
bullish.reason: 被納入避險基金看好的公用事業股名單，顯示機構投資人對其基本面的認可。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) Files To Extend New York Reactor Licenses Through 2049
bullish.reason: 申請延長紐約州核反應爐執照至 2049 年，確保了公司長期資產的營運穩定性與現金流。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) Among Stocks Expected to Bounce Back According to Analysts
bullish.reason: 市場預期該股在經歷大幅修正後將出現反彈，反映出投資人對其價值回歸的信心。

bearish.title: CEG or DUK: Which Stock Deserves to Be in Your Portfolio Now?
bearish.reason: 與 Duke Energy (DUK) 相比，在盈餘預估、股息殖利率及資本計畫方面略顯遜色，導致投資吸引力評比下降。

bearish.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) Sees a More Significant Dip Than Broader Market: Some Facts to Know
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 1.74%，表現弱於大盤，顯示短期賣壓存在。

bearish.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) Seen as High-Quality Power Demand Play, but Goldman Flags Valuation
bearish.reason: 高盛雖認可其作為 AI 電力需求受惠者的品質，但對當前估值提出警告，認為股價可能過高。

neutral.title: Constellation Announces Extension of Expiration for Exchange Offers
neutral.reason: 僅為債務交換要約的期限延長，屬於常規財務操作，對股價影響有限。

neutral.title: Does Constellation Energy Stock Add A Different Kind of Risk?
neutral.reason: 探討核能巨頭的獨特風險與回報結構，屬於中性的投資觀點分析。

neutral.title: Constellation Energy vs. GE Vernova: Which Utilities Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
neutral.reason: 對比兩家公司在不同能源領域的優勢，未給出明確的買進或賣出建議。
